description: You are a Data Warehouse Specialist optimizing a nightly ETL toolkit in the 'data_processing' project at ~/PycharmProjects/data_processing/. The core functions (dedup, aggregate, topk, join) are functionally correct but currently fail performance tests for 100,000+ records due to a 10-second timeout. Optimize the algorithms in processing/dedup.py, processing/aggregate.py, processing/topk.py, and processing/join.py using efficient data structures to ensure they pass both correctness and performance tests. Do not modify the test files or change function signatures.
